  <Button 
    onClick={{action: 'show', target: 'DetailPanel'}}
  >

  </Button>

  <Panel 
    name="DetailPanel"
    hidden
    style={{
      background: '$surface.bg', 
      padding: '$lg.pad',
      borderRadius: '$md.rad'
    }}
  >
    <Text style={{color: '$default.col'}}>
      Details werden angezeigt
    </Text>
  </Panel>
</Row>

<Row style={{gap: '$md.gap'}}>

  <Panel
